$comment: D-OPT-SWITCH-JUMP-TABLE (c70): a DENSE contiguous switch whose minCase (5000) and value span (4201) both EXCEED the arm64 cmp/sub 12-bit immediate window (0..4095). Exercises the jump-table lowering's register-materialization fallback for the bounds sub/cmp constants (aluImmOrReg -> emitBareConstToFresh, incl. the arm64 MOVZ+MOVK ladder) — a hardcoded imm form would fail A_ImmediateOperandOutOfRange on arm64. f(v)=v+1 for v in [5000,9200] else -1; probes first(==minCase>4095)/last/interior/below/above/far. gcc/clang emit a jump table and exit 42 (cross-checked x86_64 -O1, aarch64 -O1 qemu).
